nasb.text: Hear, O earth: behold, I am bringing disaster on this people, The fruit of their plans, Because they have not listened to My words, And as for My law, they have rejected it also.

esv.text: Hear, O earth; behold, I am bringing disaster upon this people, the fruit of their devices, because they have not paid attention to my words; and as for my law, they have rejected it.

cnv.text: 大地啊，要聽！ 我必使災禍臨到這人民， 這是他們的意圖帶來的結果； 因為他們沒有留心聽我的話， 我的律法他們也棄絕了。

ccb.text: 地啊，听着！ 我要降灾祸给这些百姓。 他们是自作自受， 因为他们没有听从我的话， 拒绝遵守我的律法。
